Xbox Live and Networking White Papers

This section of the XDK Help documentation contains white papers covering a variety of topics on Xbox Live and networking.

  • Competitions on Xbox Live, by Michal Bortnik
  • Marketplace, by Mark Terrano
  • Matchmaking on Xbox Live: Best Practices, by Jason Strayer
  • QoS Best Practices, Pete Isensee
  • Supporting Autoupdate, by Matt Hansen
  • Using the Xbox Network Conditions Simulator (NetSim), by Michael Austin
  • Voice Chat Best Practices, by John Harding
  • Xbox Content Signing Options, by Pete Isensee
  • Xbox Live Arbitration: Minimizing Online Cheating, by Michal Bortnik
  • Xbox Live Lessons and Best Practices, by Andre Vrignaud
  • Xbox Live Messaging, by Jeff Allen
  • Xbox Live 2003 Web Services, by Van Van
  • Xbox Secure Network Library, by Pete Isensee
  • Xbox Secure Sockets, by Pete Isensee
  • Xbox Security Architecture, by Pete Isensee
  • Xbox Security Best Practices, by Pete Isensee
Unpublished work. © 2000 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
